3211250.name: 化形
3211250.description:
The first sound you hear is the soft drip of water from a stalactite, echoing through the shadows.

In this vast subterranean world, you will encounter a mining tribe that has dwelled here for millennia, hear the mechanical footsteps of enigmatic surface-dwelling war machines reverberating through the empty corridors, and glimpse the Abyssal Heart lurking in the depths below—a remnant of an ancient horror stirring in the world's darkened underbelly. Seek the wisdom of the prophet who resides within a primordial tree, and as your journey unfolds, immerse yourself in the ways of the tribe, uncover the long-buried history of the land, piece together fragments of your lost memories, and bear witness to a fate yet to be realized. Pay close attention to every detail around you—for this is a rare second chance at life.

You wield the power of morphing, a unique ability that allows you to transform and acquire the properties of objects and creatures. Use this gift to interact with the environment, solve intricate puzzles, and embark on an extraordinary adventure.
